title: Cobblezellig
description: A cobblemon addon that adds characters from a dutch webshow called ongezellig
body:
A cobblemon addon that adds the characters from ongezellig to cobblemon!


![Mymychu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bb268a464766d3087235cf497d621e1fdeb65a0.png)


# Additons
- Peeb(Bug)
- Maya(Dark)
- Snailoco(Normal)
- Coco(Fighting)
- Agugu(Normal/Water)
- Mymy(Normal/Fairy)
- Mymychu(Electric/Fairy
- Kiki(Water/Fighting)
- Yana(Ground/Steel)
- Cleo(Dark/Fairy)
- Zoey(Psychic)
- Yfke(Grass/Poison)
- Tryn(Fairy)

## Spawn Info

-  Maya spawns Dark forests, caves and beaches, shes usually rare out in the open but she is most common in caves.
- peeb spawns in forests and plains
- Coco mostly spawns in savannas but can sometimes be found in plains.
- snailoco is mostly found in forests and lush caves but can also be found in some nether biomes
- Mymy mostly spawns in cherry groves and flower forest biomes but can also sometimes be found in plains
- agugu primarily spawns in the nether but can sometimes rarley be found in overworld forests
- Mymychu can be found in the same biomes as mymy but she is ultra rare, so the best way to get her is to evolve a mymy with a thunderstone.
- Kiki spawns on beaches and jungles but can sometimes also be found just swimming alone in the ocean.
- Yana spawns in deserts and pretty much any arid biomes.
- Cleo spawns in dark forests but can sometimes be found in plains
- Zoey spawns in dark forests but can soemtimes be found in plains
- Yfke spawns in jungles and occaisonally any flowery 
- - Tryn spawns in plains and any flowery biome like cherry groves or flower forests
 


### How to install(if you install the mod version you dont have to do this)

You must dupilcate the zip file you installed and put them in both your worlds datapack folder and the games resource pack folder.
